text: <par>The Lahu labial initial in <latinform>bɛ⁵³</latinform> is the regular reflex of an earlier labiovelar initial, with several parallel examples (e.g. DOG, NEST, COMB), see Matisoff 1986, 'Labiovelar unit phonemes in Lolo-Burmese?'.</par>
<par>Loan from Chinese, cf. Chinese mò 墨 'ink stick, ink'.</par>
